message:
🧹 Replace magic numbers in App.tsx and ContainerTetris.tsx with named constants (#10372)

Replaces inline numeric literals with named constants:
- LOADING_FLASH_DELAY_MS (200ms) in App.tsx
- PREFETCH_DEMO_CARDS_DELAY_MS (15_000ms) in App.tsx
- TETRIS_NEXT_TICK_MS (10ms) in ContainerTetris.tsx

Fixes #10370

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
